body: Hey Amara — hope the week is off to a good start on your end. I wanted to circle back on the [Verdant Grid](startups/verdant-grid) conversation we had at the end of last month; I've been thinking more about their grid-edge storage play and I think there's a real opening at the seed stage if the right lead can move quickly. Given your focus at [Halfway Capital](orgs/halfway-capital) on exactly this intersection of climate infrastructure and intelligent systems, I figured you'd want to stay close to this one. I had a call with their founder, Dayo, earlier this week and came away even more impressed — the thermal management approach they're layering in is genuinely differentiated. Would love to get on a call with you before the end of the month to compare notes and see if there's a path to co-leading. Let me know what your calendar looks like.
